description: Loss date cannot be in the future.
Loss date must be greater than or equal to the last event date.
conditions: quando o lote possuir um evento de output registrado anteriormente
exceto para animais comprados gestantes com data de entrada retroativa

description: Cannot update loss record if animal has been moved after the loss date.
Cannot delete loss record if gestating sow has farrowing events after this date.
conditions: quando o lote possuir um evento de output vinculado à baixa
